title: dransfieldia micrantha
intro: Dransfieldia micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae, commonly known as a palm tree. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dransfieldia micrantha include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from various gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of Dransfieldia micrantha typically involve the use of its leaves, which are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
